description_long: This shrine features a rustic wooden post supporting a pitched roof made of wooden planks, with a central display of a mounted animal skull and antlers. Hanging from the post are various ritualistic items, including feathers, herbs, and small pouches, suggesting shamanistic or animistic influences. At the base, a stone altar is adorned with candles, fruit offerings, and bones, all set atop a patch of lush green grass. The structure is surrounded by small rocks and scattered bones, enhancing its sacred and naturalistic ambiance. The wood appears weathered, and the roof is simple, lacking elaborate ornamentation. The overall design is compact, with a focus on natural materials and symbolic objects.
description: A rustic wooden shrine with a pitched roof, animal skull, ritual hangings, and a stone altar with offerings, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden post, roof, and a partial view of the stone altar with offerings and bones.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the animal skull and antlers, ritual hangings, and the full stone altar with candles and fruit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the wooden post, roof, and side details of the altar and hanging items.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the wooden post, roof, and some hanging ritual items, with the altar partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: open front with central post and hanging ritual items
